Title: Append Mask
Description: Append a new mask to the current operation mask.

Options.Description:
Block mask to append to the existing operation mask.

Mask Symbols:

Default = TARGET_BLOCK
! = NOT
^ = NEIGHBORING
< = BELOW
> = ABOVE
~ = NEXT TO

Example:
To effect all blocks above Rock_Stone, do:>Rock_Stone
Options.Label: Append Mask
